name: Aurelia Pendant
description: An exquisite 18k solid yellow gold necklace featuring a brilliant-cut center diamond surrounded by delicate filigree work. Handcrafted to reflect the timeless craftsmanship of Trimetra.

name: Luna Choker
description: Luminous South Sea pearls hand-selected for their mirror-like luster, strung together with a signature 18k white gold clasp encrusted with micro-pavé diamonds.

name: Vesper Sapphire Necklace
description: An enchanting deep royal blue sapphire oval center stone, surrounded by a double halo of sparkling diamonds, suspended from a delicate 18k white gold chain.

name: Starlight Necklace
description: An architectural pendant in solid white gold, with micro-pavé diamonds arranged in geometric patterns resembling the night sky.

name: Elysian Emerald Drops
description: Breathtaking teardrop Colombian emeralds suspended from line-styled diamond clusters in platinum settings. Designed to sway elegantly with every step.

name: Solitude Gold Studs
description: Timeless solitaire studs showcasing hand-set princess-cut diamonds in a minimalist four-prong 18k yellow gold basket.

name: Jharokha Ruby Studs
description: Elegant triangular studs inspired by royal Jharokha archways, featuring vibrant hand-cut rubies bordering a central polki diamond floral cluster.

name: Mayura Dome Studs
description: Dazzling round dome-style studs featuring intricate yellow gold filigree work radiating from a brilliant-cut center diamond, bordered by a delicate halo.

name: Rajkumari Polki Studs
description: Exquisite round floral-shaped studs showcasing a large central slice of polki diamond enclosed in a vibrant crimson red enamel border (meenakari) and surrounded by a pear-cut polki diamond halo.

name: Nirvana Polki Studs
description: Timeless floral cluster studs featuring a magnificent pear-shaped (teardrop) central polki diamond slice, outlined in a delicate pavé diamond border and framed by round polki petals.

name: Gulbahar Ruby Studs
description: A masterclass in color and form, these sunflower-inspired studs feature a central uncut polki diamond bordered in gold, with vibrant pinkish-purple ruby beads radiating outwards as delicate petals.

name: Empress Crescent Drops
description: Royal crescent-shaped drop earrings featuring a brilliant kundan cluster, a green emerald-inlay crescent (meenakari), and hanging south sea pearl drops. Perfectly matching the Empress Bridal Set.

name: Padma Lotus Studs
description: Delicate and lightweight floral studs crafted in yellow gold, showcasing a central brilliant-cut diamond surrounded by a ring of ten pear-shaped uncut diamonds.

name: Devika Cushion Studs
description: A contemporary blend of vintage and modern aesthetics, featuring cushion-cut polki diamonds surrounded by a double square halo of micro-pavé diamonds.

name: Golden Bloom Ring
description: An elegant solid gold ring adorned with delicate, hand-sculpted golden flowers set with brilliant-cut diamonds.

name: Golden Bloom Bracelet
description: A fluid 18k solid gold chain bracelet adorned with delicate, hand-sculpted golden flowers set with brilliant-cut diamonds.

name: Empress Bridal Set
description: A majestic bridal collar set featuring five rows of pristine seed pearls holding a grand central medallion crafted in 22k yellow gold. Encrusted with brilliant polki diamonds and a border of rich green emerald inlay (meenakari). Comes with matching crescent drop earrings.
